summary: Determines whether an HTTP conditional request can be treated as fresh based on cache directives and response validators.
signature_intent: Accepts request and response header collections and returns a boolean freshness decision.
behavior: Returns false when the request has no conditional cache validator.
Returns false when the request explicitly asks to bypass cached validation with Cache-Control: no-cache.
When If-None-Match is present and not a wildcard, requires a matching response ETag.
Accepts ETag matches across strong and weak validator forms.
When If-Modified-Since is present, requires a response Last-Modified date that is not newer than the request date.
When both ETag and modification-date validators are present, both applicable checks must pass.
Returns true only after all present freshness checks pass.
edge_cases: A wildcard If-None-Match does not require a response ETag by itself.
Missing response ETag fails non-wildcard ETag validation.
Missing response Last-Modified fails modification-date validation.
Invalid or non-comparable HTTP dates fail modification-date validation.
Cache-Control: no-cache overrides otherwise valid validators.
